message:
🐛 Fix install method detection when backend is warming up (#2329)

The /health endpoint returns 503 during the backend's cluster probe
phase. The one-shot useEffect that fetches install_method would fail
silently, leaving installMethod as 'unknown' instead of 'helm'.

This caused Helm installs to show the "kc-agent required" notice
instead of the Helm-specific self-upgrade hint.

Add retry logic (up to 2 retries with 3s delay) so the frontend
detects the install method even when the backend is still warming up.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
